name: Thorben Schreyer
why-me-motivation: I am motivated to turn ideas into growing projects, drive teams forward through innovation and new technologies, and create meaningful solutions that continuously evolve.
skill-skills: As a Frontend Developer, I create modern and responsive web applications with a strong focus on clean code and user-friendly design. Through various projects, I have gained experience with different frontend technologies and continuously expanded my skills. I enjoy learning new technologies and adapt quickly to new challenges.
reference-1: "JOIN stands out with its clear user management and well-designed ticket system. The application feels professional and practical."
reference-2: "One of the best boss fights I have played so far. The final battle against the chicken was challenging and exceptionally well implemented."
reference-3: "The ordering app offers an intuitive user experience and delivers a realistic ordering process that closely resembles well-known delivery services."
contact-read-pp: I have read the Privacy Policy and agree to the processing of my data as described.
work-together:
Let's work together.

As a Frontend Developer, I am always interested in exciting new opportunities. With a passion for modern web technologies and a commitment to building clean, user-friendly solutions, I look forward to contributing to your team.
project-burgerhouse-about: A food ordering web application featuring a shopping cart, product selection, and order overview functionality.
project-burgerhouse-technologies:
HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and
Responsive Design.
project-burgerhouse-learnd: I learned how to build dynamic user interfaces and implement complex user interactions using JavaScript.
project-burgerhouse-group: Working in a team improved my ability to collaborate on a product and implement constructive feedback effectively.
project-pollo-about: Pollo Loco is a browser-based jump-and-run game featuring animations, enemies, and interactive gameplay elements.
project-pollo-technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Canvas API, and Object-Oriented Programming.
project-pollo-learnd: I deepened my understanding of object-oriented programming, game mechanics, and performance optimization.
project-pollo-group: Team collaboration helped me divide tasks efficiently and develop creative solutions for technical challenges together.
project-join-about: Join is a Kanban-based project management tool for organizing tasks, teams, and workflows.
project-join-technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Firebase, REST APIs, and Responsive Design.
project-join-learned: I learned how to structure complex applications, work with databases, and design user-friendly interfaces.
project-join-group: Collaborating in a team strengthened my communication skills and showed me the importance of clear coordination and version control.
ongoing-projekt:
Memory-Game
Development of a responsive memory game using TypeScript and SCSS. The project focuses on strengthening core programming concepts, application logic, and modern styling techniques while creating an engaging user experience.

impressumSection3Title: Responsible for Content according to Section 18 (2) MStV
impressumSection4Content: As a service provider, I am responsible for my own content on these pages in accordance with general laws. However, I am not obligated to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or investigate circumstances indicating unlawful activity.
impressumSection5Content: This website contains links to external third-party websites whose content I have no influence over. Therefore, I cannot assume any liability for such external content. The respective provider or operator of the linked pages is always responsible for their content.
impressumSection6Content: The content and works created by the site operator on this website are subject to German copyright law. Reproduction, editing, distribution, and any kind of exploitation outside the limits of copyright law require the written consent of the respective author or creator.
privacySection2Content1: This website is hosted by an external hosting provider. When visiting this website, information is automatically collected by the web server and stored in server log files.
privacySection2List1: IP address of the requesting device
privacySection2Content3: The processing of this data is based on Article 6(1)(f) GDPR. My legitimate interest lies in ensuring the technically error-free presentation, security, and stability of this website.
privacySection3Content1: If you send me inquiries via the contact form, the information you provide, including your contact details, will be stored and processed for the purpose of handling your request and any follow-up questions.
privacySection3Content2: The following data may be processed:
privacySection3List4: Date and time of the inquiry
privacySection3Content3: Processing is carried out in accordance with Article 6(1)(b) GDPR if your inquiry is related to the initiation or performance of a contract. In all other cases, processing is based on my legitimate interest in handling incoming inquiries pursuant to Article 6(1)(f) GDPR.
privacySection3Content4: Your data will only be used to process your request and will not be shared with third parties without your explicit consent.
privacySection4Content: If you contact me by email, the personal data you provide will be processed solely for handling your inquiry.
privacySection5Content: Fonts used on this website are hosted locally on the web server. No connection to Google or other third-party font providers is established. No personal data is transmitted to third parties in this context.
privacySection6Content1: This website contains links to my GitHub and LinkedIn profiles.
privacySection6Content2: When visiting this website, no personal data is transmitted to these platforms. Data processing by the respective provider only begins once you click on a corresponding link and are redirected.
privacySection6Content3: Further information can be found in the privacy policies of the respective providers.
privacySection7Content1: This website does not use cookies for analytics, marketing, or tracking purposes.
privacySection7Content2: If technically necessary cookies are used by the hosting provider or server-side functions, their use is based on Article 6(1)(f) GDPR.
privacySection8Content: This website uses SSL/TLS encryption to protect the transmission of confidential information. You can recognize an encrypted connection by the 'https://' prefix in your browser's address bar.
privacySection9Content: Under applicable law, you have the following rights:
privacySection9List1: Right of access pursuant to Article 15 GDPR
privacySection9List2: Right to rectification pursuant to Article 16 GDPR
privacySection9List3: Right to erasure pursuant to Article 17 GDPR
privacySection9List4: Right to restriction of processing pursuant to Article 18 GDPR
privacySection9List5: Right to data portability pursuant to Article 20 GDPR
privacySection9List6: Right to object pursuant to Article 21 GDPR
privacySection10Content: You have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority regarding the processing of your personal data.
privacySection11Content1: I reserve the right to amend this privacy policy to ensure compliance with current legal requirements or to reflect changes in my services.
